chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 723 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 26. 2. For Order on CMA No. 394/2023 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Fahad, Advocate for Applicant. This reference is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even today learned Counsel seeks time for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
